scenario: A Meridian SaaS operator runs Camunda 8.8 on a tenant with 600 instances. During modification mode on one instance a new scope was just generated, and the operator wants to confirm at exactly which step Operate records an added variable as part of the pending modifications list shown for the instance.
question: At what point does Operate record an added variable on a new scope as a pending modification?

options.text: Operate records the added variable as a pending modification once the operator blurs out of the last edited field with valid Name and Value entries, not the moment of typing inside the variable form
Operate records the added variable as soon as the operator types the first character of the Name field, so the pending modifications list updates live with every keystroke that follows
Operate records the added variable only after the operator clicks Apply Modifications;  variables are buffered locally and never appear in the pending modifications view of the instance
Operate records the added variable only when the operator manually refreshes the instance page;  pending modification updates are loaded on the next page render of the instance

a.text: Correct. The docs say that once the operator blurs out of the last edited field, assuming Name and Value have valid values, the new variable is added to the pending modifications shown for the instance.

b.text: Incorrect. The pending modifications list does not update on each keystroke; the entry joins the list only after the field is blurred with valid Name and Value values.

c.text: Incorrect. Pending modifications do appear in the summary before Apply, so the variable shows up as soon as the field is blurred with a valid entry rather than only at apply time.

d.text: Incorrect. The variable is reflected in the pending modifications when the field is blurred, not on a manual page refresh of the process instance view.

explanation: For added variables on a new scope, the entry becomes a pending modification when the operator blurs out of the last edited field with valid Name and Value values. The change is then visible in the pending modifications list before being applied.
